title: Will Preparation Assistance - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Will Preparation Assistance 1 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF THE COMMONS LAW CENTER LEGAL HELP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides sliding-scale legal services to income-qualified community members. Services are available for family law (divorce, parenting plan modification, custody modification), probate (conservatorship assistance), and estate planning (advance directives, power of attorney, will preparation, trust preparation). PO Box 14280 Portland, OR 97293 Eligibility: Household income 125%-400% of the federal poverty level Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 850-0811 Get Directions Visit Website More Details THE COMMONS LAW CENTER LEGAL HELP
